_comment: Committed corpus-contract overrides, merged over the fetched expected.json by `file`. The corpus ships as a separately-versioned release asset (see corpus.lock.json), so a parser fix in code lands before expected.json can be regenerated and re-released. This is the in-repo, CI-reachable home for a fixture's updated contract in that window — it carries the full expectation (kind, parser, asserts) so golden-value coverage isn't lost. Remove an entry once the debrief-fixtures corpus is re-cut to include it. An override only applies when its target file is present in the fetched corpus.

fixtures.note: RRC3 mDACS imperial (UTF-16, TAB); altitude unit resolved from the barometric pressure column; ~13304 ft. Pending debrief-fixtures re-cut.
RRC3 mDACS metric (EUROPEAN semicolon + comma-decimal); altitude unit resolved from the barometric pressure column; ~9121 ft. Pending debrief-fixtures re-cut.
